---
title: "Group Analysis Scripts"
subtitle: "Working code from workshop groups"
---

Each group has a subfolder for their analysis scripts.

| Group | Question | Folder |
|-------|----------|--------|
| Group A | Key epidemiological parameters | `group-A/` |
| Group B | Serial interval distribution | `group-B/` |
| Group C | Reporting delays and underreporting | `group-C/` |
| Group D | Vaccine effectiveness | `group-D/` |

## Guidelines

- Use descriptive filenames prefixed with a number to indicate order (e.g. `01_explore.R`, `02_analysis.R`)
- Commit regularly so group members have access to the latest version
- Save slow-running outputs as `.rds` files and commit those too
